picker.heading: My Circles
picker.subheading: Choose a circle to see its calendar and care details.
picker.errorBody: Please check your connection and try again.

empty.title: You're not part of any care circle yet.
empty.body: Create a circle to get started, or ask someone to invite you.
empty.step1: Create a circle for your loved one.
empty.step2: Invite family and caregivers to join.
empty.companion: Prefer your phone? Get the companion app.

access.readOnlyMemberSubtitle: You can view but not edit this circle
access.viewOnlySubtitle: View-only access. Contact owner for details.

list.heading: Members
list.subheading: Everyone in this care circle. Invite or remove members in the app.
list.subheadingReadOnly: Everyone helping coordinate care in this circle.
list.errorBody: Please check your connection and try again.
list.empty: No members in this circle yet.
list.soloBody: Invite a family member or caregiver to help coordinate your loved one's care — share tasks, appointments, and updates so no one carries it alone.

errors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.saveFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

invite.title: Invite a member
invite.subtitle: We'll email them an invitation to join this care circle.

roleHints.caregiver: Can view and help coordinate care.

invite.capReached: Free circles include up to two caregivers. Upgrade to Premium to add more.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

manage.subheading: Everyone in this care circle. Invite, remove, or manage members below.
manage.removeConfirmBody: {{name}} will lose access to this care circle. You can invite them again later.
manage.cancelInviteConfirmBody: {{email}} will no longer be able to join with this invitation.
manage.leaveConfirmBody: You'll lose access to this care circle. The owner can invite you again later.

pending.heading: Your invitations
pending.subheading: Care circles that have invited you to help.
pending.invitedYou: {{inviter}} invited you to help care for {{recipient}}
pending.emptyBody: When someone invites you to a care circle, it will appear here.
pending.errorBody: Please check your connection and try again.
